name: Birchwood Bus Svc Inc
employees_est: ~9 drivers (FMCSA); listing data shows ~42 employees, likely overstated
districts_or_customers: likely Hayward Community School District and/or Birchwood School District area, Sawyer County WI (unconfirmed)
recent_news: No M&A or news found. Active intrastate school-bus carrier, USDOT 2479449, MCS-150 updated 03/04/2024; clean 24-month safety record.
fit_notes: Very small single-yard rural northern WI operator (~6 buses). Founded 2014 so not a classic succession candidate, but small scale and remote geography make this a low-priority tuck-in unless Summit is building density in Sawyer County WI. Phone (715) 634-8621.

name: Huettl Bus
fleet_size_est: unknown; listing implies ~40 employees so plausibly 20-35 buses, but unconfirmed
districts_or_customers: Seymour, WI area (Outagamie County). Note: Seymour Community School District publicly partners with All Star Transportation and Kobussen for propane buses, so Huettl may serve adjacent districts or operate as a charter/tour carrier rather than the prime Seymour SD contractor.
recent_news: No recent M&A news. Operates as Huettl Bus Inc and DBA Huettl Tours from 800 E Factory St, Seymour WI; PO Box 127.
fit_notes: Family-owned (Mike Huettl) combined school-bus and charter/tour operator in NE Wisconsin. If the Seymour-district contract has been ceded to All Star/Kobussen, Huettl's value may be in charter routes plus residual school work; succession signal modest given identified single owner. Could be a small tuck-in if Summit wants Outagamie/Brown County density.

name: M Parish Transportation
fleet_size_est: unknown; listing shows only ~15 employees suggesting <10 buses
districts_or_customers: potentially North Sanpete School District (Mount Pleasant UT 84647); unconfirmed - district transportation page does not name a private contractor
recent_news: No verifiable web footprint. Dun & Bradstreet's Mount Pleasant UT transportation directory lists 11 carriers and none are named Parish. No FMCSA SAFER hit on 'Parish Transportation' in UT. A Parish Construction LLC (Brad Parish, est. 2008) exists in Mt Pleasant but is a separate construction business.
fit_notes: Cannot confirm M Parish Transportation operates as an independent school-bus contractor. Possible the listing reflects an owner-operator school-bus route or a small contract carrier serving North Sanpete SD, but no web/regulatory evidence. Treat as a phone-verification candidate before further work; very low priority as a tuck-in given size and uncertainty.

name: Urbina Inc Which Will Do Bus
fleet_size_est: unknown - address is a virtual office
service_types: unclear - 'Which Will Do Bus' appears to be a corporate-name DBA clause not a confirmed service
districts_or_customers: none verifiable; Clark County School District uses CCSD-owned fleet and a small set of named contractors - Urbina is not among publicly listed CCSD vendors
recent_news: No verifiable web/news/FMCSA footprint for an Urbina school-bus operator in Las Vegas. The 1810 E Sahara Ave Suite 195-212 address is a virtual office / mailbox at the Sahara Business Center (OfficeNest / United Virtual Office). FMCSA's 'Urbina Trucking Inc' (USDOT 2875121) is a separate 2-truck freight carrier in Compton CA.
fit_notes: Almost certainly NOT a viable tuck-in target. Virtual-office address, unusual corporate-name suffix ('Which Will Do Business As...'), no FMCSA passenger authority found, no CCSD contractor record. Likely a small/dormant Nevada entity, an LLC name fragment, or a data-quality artifact. Recommend removing from list pending phone verification.

name: OK City Bus Inc
districts_or_customers: none verifiable. Oklahoma City Public Schools (OKCPS) runs its own transportation department; no public record of OK City Bus Inc as an OKCPS contractor
recent_news: No web footprint, no FMCSA SAFER record located, no Oklahoma Corporation Commission for-hire passenger listing match in the 10-15 passenger MC roster. Address 3001 N Classen Blvd is currently associated with a hair/nail salon per the Asian District directory; a separate FMCSA carrier (DOT# 4326320) sits at 2915 N Classen Blvd Ste 120F.
fit_notes: Unable to confirm OK City Bus Inc is an active independent school-bus operator. The listed address looks stale or shared. OKCPS self-operates buses, which further limits a private-contractor thesis here. Recommend deprioritizing pending direct phone/registration verification; not a credible tuck-in target on current evidence.
